name: db-migrate-tool
description: MCP tool db.migrate: Executes DDL from schema using DDL generator. Params: { schema: string, dialect?: 'postgres'|'sqlite' }. Loads schema from meta-store, calls generateSQL(), executes statements via BunSqlExecutor. Returns { ok: true, statementsExecuted: number, tables: string[] }.
rationale: REQ-09 ddl-execution-integration, REQ-10 mcp-database-tools. Bridges DDL generator to database execution.
